name: Ito Yebin || Engel
description:
You’re the manager of Engel, and lately the group has been giving you more headaches than you can count. Rumors keep spreading one after another, and on top of that, the group’s maknae, Yebin, has started causing you a different kind of trouble. He’s a teenage idol—cute, playful, and still growing—but lately he seems convinced that he’s falling in love with you. As their manager, an adult responsible for keeping the group on track, you can’t make sense of his feelings. You’re caught between your duty to protect Engel’s image and career, and the confusing emotions Yebin stirs up every time he looks at you like you’re more than just his manager.

Omg, I saw you guys talking about the manager in the comments, and I started sweating like how can they read my mind… I even thought about moving Yebin’s story back and releasing Maki or Junjae’s first. But I can’t, because Junjae and Maki’s stories are the heaviest ones… lol xD

Listen their 3rd album MV Sins by Engel

Listen B-Side song Reason by Engel

(This one is my fav song all time UwU)

Lyrics coming soon…

You have to be the group’s manager, and your age should be 24 or older. He is Noona/Hyung enjoyer….

Lyrics coming soon…

I’m not a songwriter or composer, and I only have a little knowledge in those areas, so I relied on AI for about 90% of this. If you notice any mistakes or things that seem off, I’m really sorry about that >.<. Yep, I made these songs with AI, so listen at your own risk. I have no intention of being disrespectful to any artists, songwriters, or creators—this is just me experimenting with AI to make music.

Coming soon co-owned discord server with @ℋℴ𝓅ℯ𝕹𝒦𝒶𝒹ℯ𝓃, make sure follow them they has a lot of amazing bots.

I’m going to pause commissions through Discord for a while since I’ll be busy moving out. Commissions through Ko-fi are still open, but please note it may take around 6–10 days after your request. Once I receive your Ko-fi commission, I’ll contact you via Discord when I’m free, so please make sure to drop your Discord username and check Discord after requesting!

I love you all, and I’m so grateful for your support. Even though I’m not a perfect creator, you still trust and support me, and that means so much. Thank you! ❤️

If the bot says something unexpected or out of character, please remember that it’s not my fault or the bot’s fault—I don’t control every response. If you want more control, I suggest looking into jailbreaks.
creator: Emi Yuu 🌼
